name: Russian Meat Balls (Bitochki)
recipeIngredient: 2 slices Bread, soaked in milk, squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in rendered kidney fat until wilted.
2. Mix beef, veal, onion, bread, salt, and a pinch of pepper.
3. Knead the mixture well and chill it in the refrigerator.
4. Wet your hands and form the chilled mixture into balls about the size of golf balls.
5. Roll each ball in bread crumbs.
6. Fry the meatballs in butter or beef fat until browned on all sides. Remove from heat and keep warm.
7. In a separate pan, add sour cream and sauteed mushrooms. Heat through.
8. Pour the sauce over the fried meatballs and serve hot.
